prompt: Create a photorealistic, softly lit portrait of a young East Asian woman seated indoors beside a large bright window. She has long straight chestnut-brown hair with a natural center part, falling over both shoulders, delicate gold hoop earrings, and a slim elegant build. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a large centered opaque square block in muted taupe-brown covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin. She wears a white sheer floral lace long-sleeve blouse with a high crew neckline and a fitted light beige high-waisted skirt. Pose her leaning slightly forward while sitting, hands together near her lap, with a calm fashion-magazine feeling. Use bright natural daylight streaming from the left, airy overexposure, soft bokeh greenery outside the window, pale stone or marble wall tiles on the right, creamy white interior surfaces, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, delicate lace detail, gentle highlights in the hair, vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio, high-resolution editorial photography style.
